_comment: Reviewer-facing mirror of WAIVED_RULES in e2e/a11y.spec.ts. Pre-existing WCAG 2.1 A/AA violations that are intentionally waived. Any other axe rule firing in the 5 covered pages (login, register, device list, admin user management, admin audit log) fails CI. Add a rule ID here AND in WAIVED_RULES (the spec is the runtime source of truth) with a short justification when widening the allowlist.

waivedRules.reason: Form helper text and muted-grey informational copy have low contrast against the dark theme. Tracked for a design pass; not a runtime regression.
Inline links in body copy (e.g. login footer 'Register' link) lack non-color affordance. Same design-pass scope as color-contrast.
Stylistic distinction (underline) for inline links — paired with link-in-text-block above.
